name: browser-use
tagline: ClawHub (112★): Automates browser interactions for web testing, form filling, screenshots, and data extraction. Use when the user needs to
verdict: Strong on quality and security for its core browser-testing tasks (form-filling, screenshots, data extraction). Two things to watch: it never states what it's out of scope for, and buried in the body it has the agent autonomously sign up for a cloud account and API key — a side effect the description doesn't mention.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / exclusion / out-of-scope guidance appears anywhere in description or body.
No version field in frontmatter, no changelog section, and no dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
Description promises browser testing/form-filling/screenshots/data-extraction, but the body also has the agent autonomously provision a cloud account/API key (Agent Self-Registrati
